title: Protocol for ESBL-EC Recovery from Stool Samples
author: Sarah Gallichan

steps.title: Preparation of Sterile Buffered Peptone Water (BPW) pre-enrichment broth
steps.instruction: Preparation of Sterile Buffered Peptone Water (BPW) pre-enrichment broth

steps.title: Add 20 g of BPW powder...
steps.instruction: Add 20 g of BPW powder to 1 L of distilled water.

steps.title: Mix well and sterilise by autoclaving at 121 °C
steps.instruction: Mix well and sterilise by autoclaving at 121 °C .

steps.title: Store at room temperature for up to 1 month
steps.instruction: Store at room temperature for up to 1 month.

steps.title: Aliquot 5 mL into 15ml falcon...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 5 mL into 15ml falcon tubes in preparation for samples.

steps.title: Preparation of Stool Solution (adapted from...
steps.instruction: Preparation of Stool Solution (adapted from maltodextrin:trehelose method in Burz et al. 2019)

steps.title: Dissolve 9
steps.instruction: Dissolve 9.4 g of maltodextrin and 3.1 g of trehalose in 450 mL of PBS.

steps.title: Put into a waterbath set to 40 °C until dissolved
steps.instruction: Put into a waterbath set to 40 °C until dissolved.

steps.title: Add 50 mL glycerol (to give...
steps.instruction: Add 50 mL glycerol (to give a final concentration of 10 % volume glycerol).

steps.title: Filter sterilise
steps.instruction: Filter sterilise.

steps.title: Aliquot 500 µL into cryovials
steps.instruction: Aliquot 500 µL into cryovials. Cryovials can be stored at Room temperature for up to 6 months. 2 cryovials will be needed for each sample.

steps.title: Stool and rectal swab processing
steps.instruction: Stool and rectal swab processing

steps.title: A) Swabs
steps.instruction: A) Swabs: Transfer the rectal swab into a 15mL falcon tube containing 5 mL of BPW enrichment broth. Cut the end of the swab and replace the cap of the falcon tube. B) Stool samples : weigh stool sample pot (use an empty pot to zero the balance) and resuspend in sample in stool solution. Use 5x the volume of stool solution per g of stool (e.g. 0.5g stool = 2.5ml of stool solution). Add a small stirrer bar to the pot and place on a magnetic stirrer to agitate the sample. Vortex sample to resuspend if necessary. Add 100 µL of resuspended stool into a 15mL falcon tube containing 5 mL of BPW.

steps.title: Incubate the tubes shaking at 220...
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes shaking at 220 rpm, 37 °C, for 4 hours.

steps.title: After 4 hours, transfer samples to...
steps.instruction: After 4 hours, transfer samples to the Class II microbiological safety cabinet (MSC) and streak each sample out onto MacConkey agar supplemented with 1 µg/mL cefotaxime using a 1 µL loop. Incubate the plates overnight at 37 °C .

steps.title: DNA extraction
steps.instruction: DNA extraction

steps.title: Pick several positive morphology colonies (colonies...
steps.instruction: Pick several positive morphology colonies (colonies that appear red/pink on MacConkey agar) and streak each colony onto a separate section of a new MacConkey agar plate supplemented with 1 µg/mL cefotaxime. Incubate the plates overnight at 37 °C .

steps.title: Transfer a 1 µL loopful of...
steps.instruction: Transfer a 1 µL loopful of each colony restreak to a 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: Preparation of cefotaxime stock solution
steps.instruction: Preparation of cefotaxime stock solution

steps.title: Dissolve cefotaxime powder in water to 200 mg/mL
steps.instruction: Dissolve cefotaxime powder in water to 200 mg/mL .

steps.title: Store at -20 °C
steps.instruction: Store at -20 °C .

steps.title: Dilute this to 10 mg/mL in...
steps.instruction: Dilute this to 10 mg/mL in water to make working stock solution.

steps.title: Preparation of MacConkey agar
steps.instruction: Preparation of MacConkey agar

steps.title: Extract DNA according to the Lucigen...
steps.instruction: Extract DNA according to the Lucigen MasterPure Complete DNA and RNA Purification kit manual, available at: https://biosearchtech.a.bigcontent.io/v1/static/manual_NAEXPU-001_MasterPure-Complete

steps.title: Suspend 50 g in 1 L distilled water
steps.instruction: Suspend 50 g in 1 L distilled water.

steps.title: Mix well and sterilise by autoclaving at 121 °C
steps.instruction: Mix well and sterilise by autoclaving at 121 °C .

steps.title: Cool to 50 °C in a...
steps.instruction: Cool to 50 °C in a water bath and add cefotaxime to a final concentration of 1 µg/mL.

steps.title: Pour into sterile petri dishes and...
steps.instruction: Pour into sterile petri dishes and allow to dry, then store at 4 °C for up to 1 month.

steps.title: Measure the concentration of all DNA...
steps.instruction: Measure the concentration of all DNA extracts using a Qubit according to the manufacturer's recommendations ( https://assets.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/LSG/manuals/Qubit_dsDNA_BR_Assay_UG.pdf ).
